name: Germany
style_of_play: Direct vertical football with aggressive pressing and emphasis on quick forward progression.
tactical_summary: Press in coordinated waves to win the ball high; attack with direct passes into the feet of advanced midfielders and wingers running in behind. Fullbacks invert or overlap depending on opponent shape.
why_it_matters: Germany's gegenpressing can disrupt build-up play and create high-quality chances before opponents settle into shape.
injury_news: Placeholder — no live squad feed connected.
